name: forge-studio
description: VS Code and Cursor extension for GitHub-centric context engineering: staged agents, Agent Skills, and chat personas aligned with issues, PRs, and milestones.
author: Alto9

chatParticipants.name: forge-help
chatParticipants.description: Workflow guide: explains Forge commands, steps, and handoffs

chatParticipants.name: product-owner
chatParticipants.description: Step 1: maintains product vision and project direction

chatParticipants.name: architect
chatParticipants.description: Step 2: enforces knowledge map structure and updates domain contracts

chatParticipants.name: planner
chatParticipants.description: Step 3: plans milestones and issues from validated direction

chatParticipants.name: technical-writer
chatParticipants.description: Step 4: refines issues and sub-issues with clear acceptance criteria

chatParticipants.name: engineer
chatParticipants.description: Step 5: implements issues, validates tests, and creates pull requests

chatParticipants.name: quality-assurance
chatParticipants.description: Step 6: reviews pull requests for correctness and security

forge.autoProjectSync.enabled.description: Enable prompt-based .forge update checks when a workspace opens or folders are added.

forge.roadmap.statusFieldName.description: GitHub Projects v2 single-select field name for issue status (used to exclude Done).

forge.roadmap.sprintFieldName.description: GitHub Projects v2 field name for sprint (single select or iteration).

forge.roadmap.doneStatusName.description: Status option value that means complete (issues with this status are hidden).

forge.temporal.mode.description: Selects managed-local dev server (npm-bundled, window-scoped) vs external Temporal endpoint. See forge/.ai/runtime/configuration.md.

forge.temporal.managedLocal.grpcPort.description: gRPC port for the window-scoped managed-local Temporal dev server.

forge.temporal.managedLocal.uiPort.description: Temporal Web UI port for managed-local mode (diagnostics only in v1).

forge.temporal.managedLocal.persistenceP.description: Override for managed-local dev server persistence directory. When empty, Forge uses {extensionGlobalStorage}/temporal/{windowId}/.

forge.temporal.managedLocal.namespace.description: Temporal namespace for managed-local workflow runs in this window.

forge.temporal.managedLocal.taskQueue.description: Default task queue for workflow workers in managed-local mode.

forge.temporal.external.address.description: gRPC endpoint for external Temporal as host:port (required when forge.temporal.mode is external).

forge.temporal.external.namespace.description: Temporal namespace for external mode (required when forge.temporal.mode is external).

forge.temporal.external.taskQueue.description: Default task queue for workflow workers connecting to the external Temporal endpoint.

forge.temporal.external.auth.mode.description: Client authentication mode for external Temporal (apiKey, tlsServer, or insecure loopback only).

forge.temporal.external.tls.enabled.description: Use TLS for external Temporal gRPC. Required for Temporal Cloud; disable only with insecure auth on loopback.

forge.temporal.external.tls.serverName.description: Optional TLS SNI / server name override for self-hosted external Temporal clusters.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: webpack --mode production --devtool hidden-source-map && npm run build:webview
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
